prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image PIXEL-FAITHFULLY — same hand from upper-left, same bag silhouette and proportions, same parted zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH logo (DIALED top-LEFT + horizontal line with center EKG spike + HEALTH bottom-RIGHT, OFFSET diagonal layout) in the upper area of the bag, same QR code on the centered/lower-middle area of the bag, same line-art style on pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line work.

THE ONLY MODIFICATION — REDRAW the assembled protector tube being lowered into the bag to match the EXACT proportions of the SECOND reference image (the real product photo of the assembled protector tube). The previous attempt was way too tall and skinny. The real proportions are STUBBY pill-bottle-like, not a tall lipstick tube:
  - Overall tube (white body + black cap stacked) — total HEIGHT ≈ 1.5x its DIAMETER. Short and chunky.
  - WHITE HEALTH BODY (lower section): stubby cylinder. Its own height ≈ slightly taller than its diameter (roughly 1.0–1.1x its diameter, NOT 1.7x). 'HEALTH' embossed horizontally across its side wall in bold sans-serif capitals wrapping with the cylinder curvature.
  - BLACK DIALED CAP (upper section): same diameter as the body, height ≈ 0.5–0.6x the diameter (short squat cap). Solid black fill with 'DIALED' in white/reversed-out capitals embossed across the side wall. Flat solid-black top.
  - The body-to-cap height ratio is roughly 60/40 — the white body is slightly taller than the black cap, but both sections are clearly short.
  - The tube diameter should be wider than the previous attempt — closer to two-thumb-widths, not one. Think 'small chess pawn / mini pill bottle' silhouette, not 'pencil'.
  - The hand pinches the BLACK CAP between thumb and fingers. With the stubby tube, only the lower half of the white HEALTH body extends into the bag (drawn faintly through the translucent plastic). The black DIALED cap and the top portion of the white HEALTH body stay above the zip seal.

The THIRD reference image is the approved step 21 illustration for the locked illustrated look of the tube (line-art treatment, white body with HEALTH, black cap with DIALED).

Do NOT modify anything else — same hand pose, same bag shape, same zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH logo, same QR code, same line weight, same white background, same line-art style. Pure black ink line work on white; the only solid-black fill is the protector tube's cap. No red, no other color. No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/protector tube top.png
